changelog.title: Android Auto Voice Search & Playback Fixes
changes: Fixed playback issues causing blank screens
Implemented voice search support in Android Auto
Added browsing support with Random Songs folder in Android Auto
Fixed 'Multiple playing browser services' conflict
Improved Google Assistant app name recognition
Added support for pronunciation variations
Songs now play directly from search results in Android Auto
Fixed manifest configuration for Google Play release

changelog.title: Android Auto Reliability Fixes
changes: Added foreground notification for reliable Android Auto connectivity
Implemented service auto-start mechanism
Fixed Android Auto connection issues in real cars
Added persistent MediaSession for in-car browsing
Improved service lifecycle management

changelog.title: Initial Release
changes: Advanced queue management with drag-to-reorder
Auto-scroll when dragging near screen edges
Haptic feedback and smooth visual animations
Browse artists, albums, and songs in Android Auto
Play full albums from Android Auto interface
Search functionality in Android Auto
Google Assistant voice command support
Multiple server management with encrypted storage
Full-featured media player with ExoPlayer
Modern Material Design 3 UI
